_publications._publicationTitle: Glial-to-mesenchymal transition of tumor Schwann cells drives the genetic burden in MPNSTs from neurofibromatosis type 1 mouse model

_contextSnippet: Conversely, SOX9 was activated in MPNSTs along with mesenchymal markers such as CD34, PDGFRA, and PDGFRB
details: Sox9 was activated in MPNSTs along with mesenchymal markers, while being absent in pNFs and dyNFs. TCs never coexpressed Sox10 and Sox9
